name: Compress files modal opens with drag-and-drop zone
description: When the user clicks the compress-files button in the header, a modal opens showing a drag-and-drop zone for file compression with format options (ZIP/TAR).

planSteps.description: Click the compress-files button in the top header bar (look for a button with an archive/zip icon)
Verify a modal dialog opens overlaying the page
Verify the modal contains a large drag-and-drop zone area for adding files
Verify the modal has format selection controls (at least ZIP and TAR options visible)
Close the modal by clicking the X button or backdrop
Verify the modal is no longer visible
